article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Railway and Pipeline Property Tax Values Updated for 2026 in British Columbia
briefs.summary: BC has updated the per-kilometre dollar values used to assess (calculate the taxable value of) railway track and pipeline property for 2026. The regulation also replaces the pipeline valuation schedules used for large and small diameter pipes.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
